description_long: This bonsai arrangement features a miniature landscape set within a round, rustic pot placed on a wooden base. The pot contains a small, leafy tree with a moderately dense canopy, surrounded by various green plants and mosses. A detailed model of a traditional East Asian-style house with a tiled roof and stone walls is integrated into the landscape, creating a scenic diorama effect. The pot itself is textured with horizontal grooves and has a natural, earthy brown color, with a visibly broken or open section that reveals the interior planting. The overall composition evokes a tranquil, garden-like scene, blending natural and architectural elements. The display is visually rich, with a harmonious balance between the greenery, the miniature house, and the textured pot.
description: A round, rustic bonsai pot holds a leafy tree, lush greenery, and a miniature East Asian-style house, creating a scenic, tranquil diorama on a wooden base.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the bonsai tree, lush foliage, and the miniature house prominently set into the landscape, with the broken pot edge and layered plants clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view shows the dense foliage obscuring much of the house, with the pot's rounded form and horizontal grooves more apparent.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the rear of the miniature house and the full roundness of the pot, with the tree and greenery forming a backdrop.
description_view_3: This angle displays the side of the house and the broken edge of the pot, with a clear view of the layered planting and textured pot surface.
attribute_pot_type: Round, rustic ceramic pot with horizontal grooves, earthy brown color, and a visibly broken/open section; sits on a square wooden base.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is gently curved, following an informal upright style with subtle bends and natural movement, giving the tree a relaxed, organic appearance.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are moderately dense and radiate outward in a somewhat layered, natural pattern, with some branches arching over the miniature house and others spreading to the sides.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is moderately dense to lush, with a full canopy at the top and some sparser areas near the trunk and lower branches.
